---
title: "Updated BVAQ Code"
author: "Joshua Perez"
date: "2026-04-08"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---


# --- 0. Load packages -----------------------------------------------
```{r}
if (!requireNamespace("tidyverse", quietly=TRUE)) install.packages("tidyverse")
if (!requireNamespace("janitor",   quietly=TRUE)) install.packages("janitor")
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
```
# --- 1. Read & clean the data --------------------------------------
```{r}
df <- read_csv("BVAQ.Data.04.07.2026.csv") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  mutate(subject_id = str_trim(as.character(subject_id)))
```

```{r}
rev_items <- c(
  # Verbalizing group: Q6,16,26,31
  6,16,26,31,
  # Fantasizing group: Q2,12,27,37
  2,12,27,37,
  # Identifying group: Q3,13,28,38
  3,13,28,38,
  # Emotionalizing group: Q14,19,29,39
  14,19,29,39,
  # Analyzing group: Q10,20,30,40
  10,20,30,40
)

rev_cols <- paste0("x", rev_items)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(rev_cols), ~ 6 - .))
```

```{r}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(subject_id = as.character(subject_id))

bad_blank_ids <- df %>%
  filter(is.na(subject_id) | subject_id == "")

bad_nonnumeric_ids <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(subject_id), subject_id != "", !str_detect(subject_id, "^[0-9]+$"))

bad_duplicate_ids <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(subject_id), subject_id != "") %>%
  group_by(subject_id) %>%
  filter(n() > 1) %>%
  ungroup()

bad_id_rows <- bind_rows(
  bad_blank_ids %>% mutate(issue = "blank_or_missing_id"),
  bad_nonnumeric_ids %>% mutate(issue = "non_numeric_id"),
  bad_duplicate_ids %>% mutate(issue = "duplicate_id")
) %>%
  distinct()

write_csv(bad_id_rows, "BVAQ_subject_id_errors.csv")
bad_id_rows_long <- bad_id_rows %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("x"),
    names_to = "item",
    values_to = "response"
  ) %>%
  arrange(subject_id, item)
if (nrow(bad_id_rows) > 0) {
  warning("Subject ID issues were found. See 'BVAQ_subject_id_errors.csv' for details.")
}
```

```{r}
df_summary <- df %>%
  filter(!is.na(subject_id), subject_id != "", str_detect(subject_id, "^[0-9]+$")) %>%
  transmute(
    subject_id = as.character(subject_id),
    Verbalizing = rowSums(
      across(all_of(paste0("x", c(1, 6, 11, 16, 21, 26, 31, 36)))),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    Fantasizing = rowSums(
      across(all_of(paste0("x", c(2, 7, 12, 17, 22, 27, 32, 37)))),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    Identifying = rowSums(
      across(all_of(paste0("x", c(3, 8, 13, 18, 23, 28, 33, 38)))),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    Emotionalizing = rowSums(
      across(all_of(paste0("x", c(4, 9, 14, 19, 24, 29, 34, 39)))),
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    Analyzing = rowSums(
      across(all_of(paste0("x", c(5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40)))),
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    BVAQ_total = Verbalizing + Fantasizing + Identifying + Emotionalizing + Analyzing,
    subject_id_num = as.numeric(subject_id)
  ) %>%
  arrange(subject_id_num) %>%
  select(-subject_id_num)
```

# --- 6. Write out & print -------------------------------------------
```{r}
write_csv(df_summary, "BVAQ_subscale_totals.csv")
print(df_summary, n = Inf)
write_csv(bad_id_rows_long, "BVAQ_subject_id_errors.csv")
print(bad_id_rows, width = Inf)
```

```{r}
hist(df_summary$BVAQ_total,
     main = "Total BVAQ Scores",
     xlab = "BVAQ Score",
     col = "skyblue",
     border = "black",
     breaks=20)
```
```{r}
hist(df_summary$Verbalizing,
     main = "Verbalizing Scores",
     xlab = "BVAQ Score",
     col = "skyblue",
     border = "black",
     breaks=20)
```
```{r}
hist(df_summary$Fantasizing,
     main = "Fantasizing Scores",
     xlab = "BVAQ Score",
     col = "skyblue",
     border = "black",
     breaks=20)
```
```{r}
hist(df_summary$Identifying,
     main = "Identifying Scores",
     xlab = "BVAQ Score",
     col = "skyblue",
     border = "black",
     breaks=20)
```
```{r}
hist(df_summary$Emotionalizing,
     main = "Emotionalizing Scores",
     xlab = "BVAQ Score",
     col = "skyblue",
     border = "black",
     breaks=20)
```

```{r}
hist(df_summary$Analyzing,
     main = "Analyzing Scores",
     xlab = "BVAQ Score",
     col = "skyblue",
     border = "black",
     breaks=20)
```

```{r}
subscale_data <- df_summary %>%
  select(Verbalizing, Fantasizing, Identifying, Emotionalizing, Analyzing)

cor_matrix <- cor(subscale_data, use = "pairwise.complete.obs", method = "pearson")

cor_long <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_matrix))

ggplot(cor_long, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = Freq)) +
  geom_tile() +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(Freq, 2)), size = 4) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Correlation Heat Map of BVAQ Subscales",
    x = "Subscale",
    y = "Subscale",
    fill = "r"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```
